## Question

-

## Source class or scoring component involved

- [ ] Signal volume
- [ ] Source independence
- [ ] Specificity
- [ ] Evidence quality
- [ ] Time acceleration
- [ ] Catalyst alignment
- [ ] Dissent quality
- [ ] Penalties
- [ ] Source coverage grade
- [ ] Signal trajectory
- [ ] Other

## Example

Use fictional or historical examples only. Do not include personal portfolio data.

-

## Boundary reminder

Crowd Signal Quality is not a buy/sell/hold score and does not measure expected return, security risk, or whether anyone should invest.
